strengths: 6+ years experience requirement met with deep full-stack tenure across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators relevant to the role
Long track record of architecture, testing discipline (TDD), and end-to-end feature delivery across multiple companies
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience, which is a core primary-stack requirement
Vitest is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being listed as a required testing framework
Kotlin is absent and cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK only) with no explicit GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond self-hosted GISCollective

key_factors.factor: Heavy reliance on DLang across past roles signals stack mismatch

response.justification: The candidate's resume shows broad full-stack tenure but lacks explicit experience in two pillars of the primary stack — Nest.js and Vitest — and omits Kotlin entirely, leaving the secondary backend stack uncovered. A significant portion of past senior work centered on DLang and bespoke ecosystems rather than the modern TypeScript/Node enterprise tooling this role demands, and cloud/containerization depth beyond AWS CDK is unproven. Combined with only recent and lightly described AI-agent work, the fit for this specific role appears weak.
